symbols.name: aggregate_lists
symbols.signature: aggregate_lists(df: pd.DataFrame, value_col: str, *, group_col: str='nct_id', dedup: bool=True, sort: bool=True, name: str | None=None)
symbols.doc: Group *df* by ``group_col`` and gather ``value_col`` into a list per group.

symbols.name: ensure_list_columns
symbols.doc: Replace NaN with ``[]`` in the named list columns (post-merge cleanup).

symbols.name: AACTLocation
symbols.doc: Where AACT lives. ``dsn_or_path`` is a DSN for POSTGRES, else a path.

symbols.name: AACTLocation.path
symbols.doc: The path for file/dir/zip backends (invalid for POSTGRES).

symbols.name: _latest_dated_subdir
symbols.doc: Most-recent ``YYYY-MM-DD`` subdirectory under *parent*, or None.

symbols.name: location_from_path
symbols.doc: Infer a file-based backend from a concrete path.

symbols.name: resolve_aact_location
symbols.doc: Resolve the AACT location via env vars then snapshot auto-discovery.

symbols.name: AACTSchemaError
symbols.doc: Raised when an AACT table is missing required columns (schema drift).

symbols.name: validate_columns
symbols.signature: validate_columns(df: pd.DataFrame, table: str, required: Iterable[str], optional: Optional[Iterable[str]]=None, *, subset: bool=True)
symbols.doc: Validate that *df* has all *required* columns; optionally project it.

symbols.name: _resolve_date_cols
symbols.signature: _resolve_date_cols(table: str, parse_dates: Optional[Sequence[str] | bool], available: Optional[Iterable[str]])
symbols.doc: Decide which columns to parse as dates.

symbols.doc: Load one AACT table.
